How's it going everybody? In this video we're creating how to create a new calendar in Acuity. This is an optional step. If you already have a calendar in Acuity that you want to use, you can use that one. You don't have to create a new one for the 42-day detox. This is just showing you how to do it and how to set up that calendar if you do make one. Go ahead and get logged into Acuity and on the left hand side you want to look for business settings. Go ahead and click on business settings and it takes you right to the availability and calendar section. Up at the top is a green button that says add a new calendar. Go ahead and click on that and go ahead and give the calendar name. So we're going to call this one 42-day detox. Go ahead and put in an email address or phone number if you want a notification for it and you can actually do multiple so you can separate with commas. We can do one email address, a comma, we can do a phone number, and then we can go and do another email address, whatever you want. I do recommend choosing a picture here that way whenever somebody does schedule an appointment on this calendar they get to see the logo. So use a good logo or image for this related to your gym or this challenge. Make sure you choose the right location because it does display the location to them when they make the appointment. Change the time zone if you need to but if you've already set up Acuity it's probably already the right time zone for you. This option right here allow appointments to be scheduled in a time slot. This allows you to change how many appointments can be booked at one time. So if you want to do one, two, three, four, five appointments however many you want go and put it there. That allows people to choose the same time slot and you can have multiple people choose that time slot and then they can all show up at once you can do it at once. If you only want one person at a time that's fine just change that back to a one or don't change it at all. Then let's go ahead and hit this green create calendar button after we check everything out. We got the name in there, we have our notification options, we have a picture chosen, the right location, we set the number of appointments that we want to take at one time. So let's click this green create calendar button and it takes us to this calendar screen. So by default it's going to have regular weekly hours meaning the same hours are going to repeat every week and if we scroll down below this you can actually see that fills in the calendar with this recurring schedule. So say you don't want to take any appointments on Sunday you can just delete what's in there and when you hit the save regular hours button right there that green button it's going to show that you're not available on Sunday at all. You can also do multiple time frames so just do a return and type that on a new line and when you hit save regular hours again it's going to go ahead and show those two different time frames. Now for some reason you're closed on a day maybe it's a holiday or you have another appointment book that day you can choose a specific day and you can clear that out by clicking on the day. So say you won't be able to do any appointments on the 31st go and click on that day on the calendar and then just delete what's in there. Once it's cleared out you can hit set hours. You can also go ahead and change it to something specific you could do eight and two one p.m. and go and hit set hours and you see it changes it just for that one day but it doesn't change any other days. Now if you want to only allow appointments on certain time frames you can do that as well it is a little more difficult to set up because you do have to make sure you choose every single day you're available for appointments. So to set it up to where it's not a regular recurring schedule to where it's only on specific days one time you want to clear this check mark right here next to this calendar has regular hours every week. Go ahead and click on that and I'll show you this morning switching to availability only for specific days will remove your currently regular weekly hours. So it will completely clear your available hours and give you a blank calendar to go ahead and schedule which specific time slots you're available for. So let's go ahead and hit save switch to specific days and you see since we set a specific day right there since that wasn't one of the regular weekly hours it stayed and you can go ahead and add in the rest of the days that you want to be available for this. Now just keep in mind if you go with this option you do have to go through and change this every single time for every day and it can be a little cumbersome if you're not able to get in here every day to make sure to set those hours because if you don't have appointments available if you aren't available on the calendar your clients won't be able to schedule those appointments that you want. Let's go and click on settings up here at the top of the calendar. Here you can go ahead and edit some of the settings on here the notifications the image another option here that you do want to always double check is this prevent schedule clients scheduling new appointments less than one hours in advance and cancelling less than one hours in advance. So if you had changed right there you can actually change it instead of this default scheduling limits prevent clients from scheduling new appointments less than one hours in advance more than 30 days in the future cancelling one hours in advance so this 30 days in the future is important. If for instance you're available a week from now so today is the 23rd for me and so if you're available only on the 30th and you set those availability days but this is only set to two days if somebody were to click on your calendar link and to schedule an appointment they wouldn't see your appointments at all so this is always something you want to come in and change and you want to make sure you give it a pretty wide gap that way they can see any appointments in the upcoming future to schedule their time for. You can also change the number of appointments you want to do for double booking and you can also choose just a maximum number of appointments say you only want 20 slots in this challenge total you can choose a maximum amount of appointments and set it to per day per week and so that's another option but you don't have to so again just a quick review of the settings let's go ahead and hit save calendar to save what we have and this is what it looks like by default right here where it says prevent client scheduling new appointments less than one hours in advance click this change link right there and double check your default right there for the days in the future make sure it's a wide enough window for them to see appointments coming up when you're going to be available. Let's go ahead and hit the save calendar at the bottom that way it saves any changes we made and that's all you need to do to create a new calendar and acuity it's already set up for how we want it at this point and we can go ahead and work on our appointments next. Hope you enjoyed this video.
